description: Product descriptionWhite boat neck top made of 100% cotton, with dolman sleeves, neck and chest graphic, bow on left shoulder and elastic gathers on the side endsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleachDo not wringDry in shadeMedium iron onlyFeminine to the T, this white top from jealous 21's Jealous 20 range is an absolute favourite with young ladies. The black graphic of a pretty girl's hair and eyes running all across the dolman sleeves and the neck to the chest, coupled with a black bow on the left shoulder adds to it a sense of subtle style. Enjoy the pleasure of dry and fresh comfort in the cotton tee, while the dolman sleeves accentuate your rounded arms. The elastic gathers help this t-shirt Fit well around your hips, allowing you to pair this top with jeans or short denim skirts, and stylish feminine sandals available in a wide range at myntra, to don that absolutely casually stylish look.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
